title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal Act, 1987. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification, appoint.
footnote: 1. 8th November, 1989, vide notification No. S.O. 783(E), dated 5th October, 1989, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
